name: layered-sfx-scaffold
description: scaffold_layered_sfx builds a blank, band-disciplined 4-layer SFX skeleton (sub/body/top/transient) the agent then fills in — pure structure, not a preset. Replay with: tono replay docs/examples/layered-sfx-scaffold.json

steps.note: Returns a Tracks document with four mixer layers, each a mul[chain[placeholder source, band filter], one-shot env] at a sensible starting gain: sub (sine an octave down, lowpassed — weight), body (PLACEHOLDER sine through a bandpass at the fundamental — swap in fm/super/saw for the real identity), top (highpassed noise — air), transient (short punchy noise click — the 'now'). From here: set_param to replace the body source, the `layer` tool (op set) to rebalance using the per-layer stats every render reports.
